title: The Andhra Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2014
full_text: The Andhra Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2014 आंध्र प्रदेश पुनर्गठन अधिनियम, 2014 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201406 Act Number: 06 Enactment Date: 2014-03-01 Act Year: 2014 Short Title: The Andhra Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2014 Hindi Title: आंध्र प्रदेश पुनर्गठन अधिनियम, 2014 Long Title: An Act to provide for the reorganisation of the existing State of Andhra Pradesh and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 02-06-2014 Notification: 2nd June, 2014, vide notification No. S.O. 655(E), dated 4th March, 2014, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Formation of Telangana State. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. State of Andhra Pradesh and territorial divisions thereof. Governor of existing State of Andhra Pradesh to be common Governor. Section 8. Responsibility of Governor to protect residents of common capital of Hyderabad. Section 9. Amendment of Fourth Schedule to Constitution. Section 13. Allocation of sitting members. Section 14. Representation in House of the People. Section 15. Representation of Anglo-Indian community. Section 19. Allocation of sitting members. Section 20. Duration of Legislative Assemblies. Section 21. Speaker, Deputy Speaker and rules of procedure. Section 22. Legislative Council for successor States. Show Related Subordinates Section 23. Provisions as to Legislative Councils. Section 24. Amendment of Delimitation of Council Constituencies Order. Show Related Subordinates Section 25. Chairman, Deputy Chairman and rules of procedure. Section 26. Delimitation of constituencies. Section 27. Power of Election Commission to maintain Delimitation Orders up-to date. Section 28. Amendment of Scheduled Castes Order. Section 29. Amendment of Scheduled Tribes Order. Section 30. Certain provisions for companies. Section 72. Temporary provisions as to continuance of certain existing road transport permits. Section 73. Special provisions relating to, retrenchment compensation in certain cases. Section 74. Special provision as to income-tax. Section 75. Continuance of facilities in certain State institutions. Provisions as to continuance of officers in same post. Section 80. Advisory committees. Section 81. Power of Central Government to give directions. Section 82. Successor States to follow principles, guidelines, etc., issued by Central Government. Section 93. Measures for progress and development of successor States. Section 94. Amendment of article 371D of the Constitution. Section 98. Amendment of section 15A of Act 43 of 1951. Section 99. Amendment of section 15 of Act 37 of 1956. Section 100. Territorial extent of laws.
